sql:
WITH reused_data AS (
  SELECT an.id
  FROM aka_name AS an
  WHERE an.imdb_index IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT a.id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM reused_data AS a

GROUP BY a.id
;

plan.queryText: SELECT cc.id, cc.movie_id, cc.subject_id, cc.status_id, t.id, t.title, t.imdb_index, t.kind_id, t.production_year, t.imdb_id, t.phonetic_code, t.episode_of_id, t.season_nr, t.episode_nr, t.series_years, t.md5sum, mc.id, mc.movie_id, mc.company_id, mc.company_type_id, mc.note FROM complete_cast AS cc LEFT JOIN title AS t ON cc.movie_id = t.id LEFT JOIN movie_companies AS mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id ;

sql:
SELECT cc.id, cc.movie_id, cc.subject_id, cc.status_id, t.id, t.title, t.imdb_index, t.kind_id, t.production_year, t.imdb_id, t.phonetic_code, t.episode_of_id, t.season_nr, t.episode_nr, t.series_years, t.md5sum, mc.id, mc.movie_id, mc.company_id, mc.company_type_id, mc.note
FROM complete_cast AS cc
LEFT JOIN title AS t
  ON cc.movie_id = t.id
LEFT JOIN movie_companies AS mc
  ON t.id = mc.movie_id
;

plan.queryText: SELECT ci.id, ci.person_id, ci.movie_id, ci.person_role_id, ci.note, ci.nr_order, ci.role_id, cc.id, cc.movie_id, cc.subject_id, cc.status_id, t.id, t.title, t.imdb_index, t.kind_id, t.production_year, t.imdb_id, t.phonetic_code, t.episode_of_id, t.season_nr, t.episode_nr, t.series_years, t.md5sum FROM cast_info AS ci INNER JOIN title AS t ON ci.movie_id = t.id INNER JOIN complete_cast AS cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id ;

sql:
SELECT ci.id, ci.person_id, ci.movie_id, ci.person_role_id, ci.note, ci.nr_order, ci.role_id, cc.id, cc.movie_id, cc.subject_id, cc.status_id, t.id, t.title, t.imdb_index, t.kind_id, t.production_year, t.imdb_id, t.phonetic_code, t.episode_of_id, t.season_nr, t.episode_nr, t.series_years, t.md5sum
FROM cast_info AS ci
INNER JOIN title AS t
  ON ci.movie_id = t.id
INNER JOIN complete_cast AS cc
  ON t.id = cc.movie_id
;

plan.queryText: SELECT ci.id, ci.person_id, ci.movie_id, ci.person_role_id, ci.note, ci.nr_order, ci.role_id, ml.id, ml.movie_id, ml.linked_movie_id, ml.link_type_id, t.id, t.title, t.imdb_index, t.kind_id, t.production_year, t.imdb_id, t.phonetic_code, t.episode_of_id, t.season_nr, t.episode_nr, t.series_years, t.md5sum FROM cast_info AS ci INNER JOIN title AS t ON ci.movie_id = t.id INNER JOIN movie_link AS ml ON t.id = ml.movie_id ;

sql:
SELECT ci.id, ci.person_id, ci.movie_id, ci.person_role_id, ci.note, ci.nr_order, ci.role_id, ml.id, ml.movie_id, ml.linked_movie_id, ml.link_type_id, t.id, t.title, t.imdb_index, t.kind_id, t.production_year, t.imdb_id, t.phonetic_code, t.episode_of_id, t.season_nr, t.episode_nr, t.series_years, t.md5sum

INNER JOIN title AS t

INNER JOIN movie_link AS ml
  ON t.id = ml.movie_id
;

plan.queryText: SELECT cn.id, cn.country_code, cn.imdb_id, cn.md5sum, cn.name FROM company_name AS cn INNER JOIN movie_companies AS mc ON cn.id = mc.company_id INNER JOIN company_type AS ct ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id ;

sql:
SELECT cn.id, cn.country_code, cn.imdb_id, cn.md5sum, cn.name
FROM company_name AS cn

INNER JOIN company_type AS ct
  ON mc.company_type_id = ct.id
;

;

plan.queryText: SELECT ci.id, ci.movie_id, ci.person_id FROM cast_info AS ci INNER JOIN char_name AS cn ON ci.person_role_id = cn.id INNER JOIN title AS t ON ci.movie_id = t.id INNER JOIN complete_cast AS cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id ;

sql:
SELECT ci.id, ci.movie_id, ci.person_id
FROM cast_info AS ci
INNER JOIN char_name AS cn
  ON ci.person_role_id = cn.id
INNER JOIN title AS t
  ON ci.movie_id = t.id
INNER JOIN complete_cast AS cc
  ON t.id = cc.movie_id
;

sql:

FROM cast_info AS ci

plan.queryText: SELECT ci.id, ci.movie_id, ci.person_id FROM cast_info AS ci INNER JOIN char_name AS cn ON ci.person_role_id = cn.id INNER JOIN title AS t ON ci.movie_id = t.id INNER JOIN movie_link AS ml ON t.id = ml.linked_movie_id ;

sql:
SELECT ci.id, ci.movie_id, ci.person_id
FROM cast_info AS ci
INNER JOIN char_name AS cn
  ON ci.person_role_id = cn.id
INNER JOIN title AS t
  ON ci.movie_id = t.id
INNER JOIN movie_link AS ml
  ON t.id = ml.linked_movie_id
;

FROM cast_info AS ci

plan.queryText: SELECT ci.id, ci.movie_id, ci.person_id FROM cast_info AS ci INNER JOIN title AS t ON ci.movie_id = t.id INNER JOIN complete_cast AS cc ON t.id = cc.movie_id INNER JOIN kind_type AS kt ON t.kind_id = kt.id ;

sql:
SELECT ci.id, ci.movie_id, ci.person_id
FROM cast_info AS ci
INNER JOIN title AS t
  ON ci.movie_id = t.id
INNER JOIN complete_cast AS cc
  ON t.id = cc.movie_id
INNER JOIN kind_type AS kt
  ON t.kind_id = kt.id
;

sql:

FROM cast_info AS ci

;
